title: bursera xochipalensis
intro: Bursera xochipalensis, also known as Xoconoztli or Xochipal, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bursera xochipalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for various forms of consumption and application.
